[[Portal:File:The-portal-group-icon-flat-dark.png|right|150px]]

Projects in the Portal Community are primarily tracked by [[Portal:The Portal Projects Group]]. Each project is related to ideas expressed on [[Portal:The Portal Podcast]] or by [[Portal:Eric Weinstein]]. If you know of a project that isn't on this list, please add it!

This page exists to:
* Present completed work and connect volunteers to projects
* Nurture new projects and bring them to life

==Projects==
<section begin=projects-boxes /><div class="flex-container">
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Graph, Wall, Tome=== 
|content=Fundamental physics seems unreachable for many. This project and its subprojects aim to map and convey the information necessary to understand the most vibrant realm of human knowledge. ([https://discord.gg/Z3u3pPm On Discord])
* '''[[Portal:Read|Book List]]'''
* '''[[Portal:Graph, Wall, Tome|Hub Page]]'''
** [[Portal:Decoding the Graph-Wall-Tome Connection]]
** [[Portal:Editing the Graph]]
** [[Portal:Defacing the Wall]]
** [[Portal:Rewriting the Tome]]
* [[Portal:Porta]] - [https://discord.gg/cmr32pJ On Discord]
* [[Portal:Portal Book Club]] - [https://discord.gg/su5uMWd On Discord]
** [[Portal:The Road to Reality Study Notes]]
* [[Portal:Theory of Geometric Unity]] - [https://discord.gg/hej6Yfu On Discord]}}
    </div>
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Slipping the DISC===
|content=In almost any field of human activity, mechanisms emerge to suppress or downregulate low-quality ideas in order to maintain an institution's functions. These mechanisms become pathological when they are repurposed to suppress truth, research, and innovation that may upset or drastically alter the institution's structure, ultimately in betrayal of its purpose.
* '''[[Portal:Slipping the DISC|Hub Page]]'''
* [[Portal:Early Voices of the Coronavirus]] - [https://discord.gg/78wqu4N On Discord]
* [[Portal:Russell Conjugation Illuminator]] - [https://discord.gg/MkqVGPp On Discord]
* [[Portal:Science Since Babylon]]
* [[Portal:Science, The Endless Frontier]]}}
    </div>
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Meta Projects===
|content=Tracking the Portal's many ideas can be difficult. These projects organize and reconvey those ideas, or develop technology to convey them.
|links=
* [[Portal:3D Printing for the Portal]] - [https://discord.gg/Djh4mY6 On Discord]
* [[Portal:Eric’s Most Important Set of Books]]
* [[Portal:Eric's Nightmare Species]]
* [[Portal:Ericisms]]
* [[Portal:Eric Weinstein Quotes]] - [https://discord.gg/dxMQxeM On Discord]
* [[Portal:Episode Highlights]]
* [[Portal:The Portal Clips]] - [https://discord.gg/RuvXkdR On Discord]
* [[Portal:Portal Mobile App]] - [https://discord.gg/RsbCyHn On Discord]
* [[Portal:Portal VR]]
* [[Portal:Portal Player]] - [https://discord.gg/mPpysKq On Discord]
* [[Portal:The Portal Essay Club]]
* '''[[Portal:The Portal Wiki]]''' - [https://discord.gg/U28Ws5U On Discord]
* [[Portal:Predictions Eric Got Right]] - [https://discord.gg/gwXh5nz On Discord]
* [[Portal:Riffs to Animate]] - [https://discord.gg/SuQVrny On Discord]
* [[Portal:The Portal Transcripts]] - [https://discord.gg/6cQueyq On Discord]
* [[Portal:Tribal Drinking Songs]] - [https://discord.gg/g4DsDSz On Discord]}}
    </div>
</div><section end=projects-boxes />

== Meta ==
{{GenericBox
|header='''Starting a Project'''
|content=First you have an idea, then it becomes a project. Make something of substance or show how previous work will help you make meaningful contributions.}}
<br>
{{GenericBox
|header='''Archived/Completed Projects'''
|content=Projects that have been completed or remained long inactive are listed here. Projects that began in name only and showed no public development are removed from the wiki.
* [[Portal:Climbing the Cliff]] (Archived) - [https://discord.gg/Bcxk8P8 On Discord]
* [[Portal:Convex Hull of Radical Longevity]] (Stalled) - [https://discord.gg/rYyEfQZ On Discord]
* [[Portal:Deface the Wall]] (Completed)
* [[Portal:Holonomy Project]] (Stalled)
* [[Portal:Interactive Wall]] (Completed) - [https://discord.gg/taJYAY9 On Discord]
* [[Portal:Postprint]] (Archived)
* [[Portal:We the Screamers]] (Completed) - [https://discord.gg/RmSASA5 On Discord]}}
__NOTOC__
[[Category:Projects]]
[[Category:Community]]
[[Category:The Portal Group]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
